sentences: The Harborview Museum of Natural History will close its doors to the public from Monday, August 5, through Friday, August 30, to undergo a comprehensive renovation of its main exhibition halls.
The project, funded in part by a $2 million grant from the City Arts Council, will modernize display systems and improve accessibility throughout the building.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this announcement?
choices: (C) To promote upcoming educational programs
(B) To inform the public of a museum's temporary closure
(D) To request donations for museum renovations
(A) To announce the opening of a new exhibition
choices_kr: (A) 박물관의 임시 폐관을 대중에게 알리기 위해
(C) 박물관 리모델링을 위한 기부를 요청하기 위해
steps.kr: Harborview 자연사박물관은 주요 전시실의 종합적인 리모델링을 위해 8월 5일부터 8월 30일까지 폐관한다. City Arts Council의 200만 달러 보조금으로 일부 지원되는 이 프로젝트는 전시 시스템을 현대화하고 건물 전체의 접근성을 개선할 것이다.

sentences: Visitors who hold valid annual memberships will receive a one-month extension on their current membership period as compensation for the closure.
Season ticket holders are advised to contact the membership office at membership@harborviewmuseum.org to confirm their updated expiration dates.
steps.question: What will annual members receive during the closure period?
steps.question_kr: 연간 회원들은 폐관 기간 동안 무엇을 받는가?
choices: (D) A one-month extension to their membership
(C) Free access to partner museums
(A) Priority tickets for the reopening event
(B) A full refund of their membership fee
steps.kr: 유효한 연간 회원권 보유자는 폐관 보상으로 회원 기간이 1개월 연장된다. 시즌권 소지자는 업데이트된 만료일 확인을 위해 membership@harborviewmuseum.org로 연락하도록 권고된다.

sentences: The museum's gift shop and café will remain accessible to the public throughout the renovation period via a temporary entrance on Maple Avenue.
Upon reopening on September 2, the museum will debut its newly redesigned permanent collection, featuring an expanded prehistoric life wing and a state-of-the-art planetarium.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the museum after the renovation?
steps.question_kr: 리모델링 후 박물관에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) It will close permanently after the renovation
(D) It will reduce the size of its gift shop
(C) It will offer new exhibits that were not there before
(A) It will charge higher admission fees
choices_kr: (B) 이전에 없던 새로운 전시를 제공할 것이다
steps.kr: 박물관 기념품점과 카페는 Maple Avenue 임시 입구를 통해 계속 이용 가능하다. 9월 2일 재개관 시 확장된 선사시대 생명 전시관과 최첨단 플라네타리움을 갖춘 새로운 상설 컬렉션을 선보일 것이다.

sentences: Meridian Technologies announced yesterday that it has completed its acquisition of CloudBridge Solutions, a leading provider of enterprise data management software, for an estimated $380 million.
The deal, which was first reported in January, is expected to significantly expand Meridian's presence in the rapidly growing cloud computing market.
steps.question: What is this article mainly about?
steps.question_kr: 이 기사는 주로 무엇에 관한 것인가?
choices: (B) The financial difficulties of CloudBridge Solutions
(C) The completion of a corporate acquisition
(A) Changes in cloud computing regulations
(D) The launch of a new cloud computing product
steps.kr: Meridian Technologies는 기업 데이터 관리 소프트웨어 공급업체인 CloudBridge Solutions를 약 3억 8천만 달러에 인수 완료했다고 발표했다. 이 거래는 클라우드 컴퓨팅 시장에서 Meridian의 입지를 크게 확장할 것으로 예상된다.

sentences: CloudBridge's existing team of 420 employees will be integrated into Meridian's operations division, with no planned redundancies according to the company's official statement.
The combined entity will serve over 3,000 corporate clients across 28 countries.
steps.question: According to the article, what will happen to CloudBridge employees?
steps.question_kr: 기사에 따르면, CloudBridge 직원들은 어떻게 되는가?
choices: (B) They will work independently under a new brand
(C) They will be relocated to Meridian's headquarters
(D) They will be offered voluntary retirement packages
(A) They will join Meridian's operations division
choices_kr: (C) 새 브랜드 아래 독립적으로 일할 것이다
steps.kr: CloudBridge의 기존 420명 직원팀은 감원 계획 없이 Meridian의 운영 부서에 통합될 것이다. 합병된 회사는 28개국에 걸쳐 3,000개 이상의 기업 고객에게 서비스를 제공할 것이다.

sentences: Industry analysts have responded positively to the merger, noting that CloudBridge's proprietary data encryption technology fills a critical gap in Meridian's current product lineup.
Meridian's stock rose 4.2 percent in early trading following the announcement, reflecting investor optimism about the deal's long-term strategic value.
steps.question: What is implied about the acquisition?
steps.question_kr: 인수에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) It will result in significant job losses at Meridian
(D) It was opposed by most industry analysts
(C) It was motivated primarily by reducing competition
(A) It is expected to strengthen Meridian's product offerings
choices_kr: (C) Meridian에서 상당한 일자리 감소를 초래할 것이다
(B) Meridian의 제품 라인업을 강화할 것으로 예상된다
steps.kr: 업계 분석가들은 CloudBridge의 독자적인 데이터 암호화 기술이 Meridian의 현재 제품 라인의 중요한 공백을 채운다고 언급하며 합병에 긍정적으로 반응했다.

sentences: We are pleased to announce that Vanguard Legal Associates will be relocating its offices to the newly constructed Pinnacle Tower at 88 Commerce Drive, effective November 1.
This move reflects our firm's continued growth and our commitment to providing clients and staff with a modern, state-of-the-art working environment.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this notice?
choices: (C) To announce the firm's merger with another company
(B) To notify staff of changes to working hours
(A) To promote the firm's new legal services
(D) To inform clients and staff of an office relocation
steps.kr: Vanguard Legal Associates가 11월 1일부로 88 Commerce Drive에 새로 건설된 Pinnacle Tower로 사무소를 이전한다고 기쁘게 알려드립니다. 이번 이전은 회사의 지속적인 성장과 고객 및 직원들에게 현대적인 근무 환경을 제공하려는 의지를 반영합니다.

sentences: All telephone numbers and email addresses will remain unchanged, and client files will be transferred securely prior to the move.

Clients with scheduled appointments during the transition week of October 28-31 are advised to confirm their appointment details with their assigned attorney, as some meetings may need to be rescheduled.
steps.question: What are clients with appointments during October 28-31 advised to do?
choices: (B) Confirm their appointment details with their attorney
(D) Visit the new office at Pinnacle Tower
(A) Contact the main reception to update their records
(C) Cancel their appointments and rebook after November 1
choices_kr: (B) 담당 변호사에게 예약 세부 사항 확인
(D) 메인 안내 데스크에 연락하여 기록 업데이트
steps.kr: 모든 전화번호와 이메일 주소는 변경되지 않으며, 고객 파일은 이전 전에 안전하게 이전된다. 10월 28-31일 이전 주에 예약이 있는 고객들은 담당 변호사에게 예약 세부 사항을 확인하도록 권고된다.

sentences: The new location offers significantly expanded office space, a dedicated client consultation suite, and underground parking for up to 80 vehicles.
We look forward to welcoming you to our new home and continuing to deliver the exceptional legal services you have come to expect from Vanguard.
steps.question: What is implied about Vanguard Legal Associates' current office?
steps.question_kr: Vanguard Legal Associates의 현재 사무소에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It is shared with another law firm
(C) It recently underwent major renovations
(B) It is located in a modern building
(D) It has fewer amenities than the new location
steps.kr: 새 위치는 크게 확장된 사무 공간, 전용 고객 상담실, 최대 80대를 위한 지하 주차장을 제공한다. 새 사무소에서 여러분을 환영하고 탁월한 법률 서비스를 계속 제공하기를 기대합니다.

sentences: Hometech Appliances has issued a voluntary recall of approximately 15,000 units of its HT-700 Series electric pressure cookers sold between January and September of this year.
The company identified a potential defect in the lid-locking mechanism that could, under certain conditions, cause the lid to open unexpectedly during operation, posing a burn risk to users.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (C) To warn consumers about a defective product recall
(D) To promote safer alternatives to pressure cookers
(A) To announce a new product launch by Hometech
(B) To report a lawsuit filed against Hometech Appliances
choices_kr: (B) 결함 제품 리콜에 대한 소비자 경고
(C) Hometech Appliances를 상대로 제기된 소송 보도
steps.kr: Hometech Appliances는 올해 1월부터 9월 사이에 판매된 약 15,000개의 HT-700 Series 전기 압력솥에 대한 자발적 리콜을 발표했다. 뚜껑 잠금 장치의 잠재적 결함이 작동 중 화상 위험을 초래할 수 있다는 것을 확인했다.

sentences: Customers who own an affected unit are asked to immediately discontinue use and contact Hometech's customer support line at 1-800-HOMETECH to arrange a free replacement.
Proof of purchase is not required to qualify for the replacement program.
steps.question: What must customers do if they own an affected product?
steps.question_kr: 해당 제품을 소유한 고객들은 무엇을 해야 하는가?
choices: (C) Stop using it and call Hometech's support line
(B) Submit a written complaint to the consumer protection agency
(D) Wait for a Hometech representative to contact them
(A) Return the product to the store where it was purchased
choices_kr: (B) 사용을 중단하고 Hometech 지원 라인에 전화
(D) 소비자 보호 기관에 서면 민원 제출
steps.kr: 해당 제품을 소유한 고객은 즉시 사용을 중단하고 1-800-HOMETECH로 연락하여 무료 교체를 마련하도록 요청된다. 교체 프로그램 자격을 얻기 위해 구매 증명이 필요하지 않다.

sentences: The recall affects models with serial numbers beginning with HT7 followed by a letter between A and G.
Models purchased after October 1 are not affected, as the manufacturing defect was corrected at that time.
Hometech has reported no injuries related to the defect so far, but emphasizes that the recall is being conducted as a precautionary measure.
steps.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned in the article?
choices: (D) When the defect was fixed in manufacturing
(C) The number of injuries reported so far
(B) The serial numbers of affected models
(A) The countries where the recall applies
steps.kr: 리콜은 HT7로 시작하는 일련번호 모델에 영향을 미친다. 10월 1일 이후 구매한 모델은 영향을 받지 않는다. Hometech는 지금까지 결함과 관련된 부상을 보고하지 않았지만 예방 조치로 시행되고 있다고 강조한다.

sentences: The city's Metropolitan Transit Authority (MTA) has announced a $150 million infrastructure upgrade to the Central Line subway system, scheduled to begin in the spring.
The project aims to replace aging signal equipment, install platform screen doors at 12 stations, and introduce a new contactless fare payment system across the entire network.
steps.question: What is this article primarily about?
steps.question_kr: 이 기사는 주로 무엇에 관한 것인가?
choices: (D) The introduction of a new bus rapid transit line
(B) The MTA's annual financial report
(A) A major upgrade to the city's subway system
(C) Environmental concerns about subway construction
steps.kr: MTA는 봄에 시작될 예정인 Central Line 지하철 시스템에 대한 1억 5천만 달러 규모의 인프라 업그레이드를 발표했다. 노후화된 신호 장비 교체, 스크린도어 설치, 비접촉식 요금 결제 시스템 도입을 목표로 한다.

sentences: Construction will be carried out primarily during overnight hours to minimize disruption to daily commuters.
However, passengers should expect weekend service suspensions on the Central Line between Harbor Station and Riverside Junction from April through August.
steps.question: According to the article, when will service suspensions occur?
steps.question_kr: 기사에 따르면, 서비스 중단은 언제 발생하는가?
choices: (C) On weekday mornings from April through August
(D) Every night throughout the construction period
(B) Only during the final week of construction
(A) On weekends from April through August
steps.kr: 공사는 주로 야간에 진행된다. 그러나 승객들은 4월부터 8월까지 Harbor Station과 Riverside Junction 사이에서 주말 서비스 중단을 예상해야 한다.

sentences: MTA Chairman Patricia Nguyen stated that the upgrades represent the most significant investment in the city's transit infrastructure in over three decades.
The new contactless payment system, compatible with most smartphones and bank cards, is expected to reduce boarding times by up to 30 percent, potentially easing congestion at peak hours.
steps.question: What can be inferred from the article?
choices: (A) The subway system was upgraded three decades ago
(B) The MTA plans to expand the Central Line to new areas
(D) Smartphone payments are not currently accepted on the network
(C) The current payment system slows down boarding
choices_kr: (D) 현재 네트워크에서 스마트폰 결제가 허용되지 않는다
(C) MTA는 Central Line을 새 지역으로 확장할 계획이다
(B) 현재 결제 시스템은 승차 속도를 늦춘다
steps.kr: MTA 의장은 이번 업그레이드가 30년 이상 만에 가장 중요한 투자라고 말했다. 새로운 비접촉식 결제 시스템은 승차 시간을 최대 30% 단축하여 피크 시간대의 혼잡을 완화할 것으로 예상된다.

sentences: GlobalTech Industries has announced its acquisition of DataVault Solutions, a leading cloud storage provider based in Austin, Texas, in a deal valued at approximately $3.4 billion.
The merger, which is expected to be finalized by the end of the third quarter, will combine GlobalTech's hardware manufacturing capabilities with DataVault's cloud infrastructure.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (D) To describe employee layoffs
(A) To report a corporate acquisition
(C) To introduce a new product line
(B) To announce quarterly financial results
steps.kr: GlobalTech Industries는 텍사스 오스틴에 본사를 둔 선도적 클라우드 스토리지 업체 DataVault Solutions을 약 34억 달러에 인수한다고 발표했다. 3분기 말까지 마무리될 이 합병은 GlobalTech의 하드웨어 제조 능력과 DataVault의 클라우드 인프라를 결합할 것이다.

sentences: As part of the agreement, all 2,800 DataVault employees will retain their current positions for a minimum of 18 months following the transition.
GlobalTech CEO Maria Chen stated that no layoffs are planned and that the company intends to expand its workforce by an additional 500 positions within the next year.
steps.question: What will happen to DataVault employees after the merger?
steps.question_kr: 합병 후 DataVault 직원들에게 어떤 일이 일어나는가?
choices: (B) They will keep their jobs for at least 18 months
(D) They will undergo mandatory retraining
(C) They will receive severance packages
(A) They will be transferred to overseas offices
steps.kr: 합의의 일환으로 DataVault 직원 2,800명 전원은 전환 후 최소 18개월간 현재 직위를 유지한다. GlobalTech CEO Maria Chen은 해고 계획이 없으며 향후 1년 내 500개의 추가 일자리를 늘릴 계획이라고 밝혔다.

sentences: Industry analysts predict that the combined entity will become the third-largest cloud services provider in North America, directly competing with established giants in the sector.
The acquisition is subject to regulatory approval from the Federal Trade Commission, which is expected to review the deal over the coming weeks.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the merger?
steps.question_kr: 합병에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) It will make the combined company a major player in cloud services
(D) It is opposed by industry analysts
(A) It has already received government approval
(C) It will result in reduced cloud service prices
choices_kr: (C) 클라우드 서비스 가격 인하를 가져올 것이다
(B) 합병 회사를 클라우드 서비스의 주요 기업으로 만들 것이다
steps.kr: 업계 분석가들은 합병 회사가 북미 3위의 클라우드 서비스 업체가 되어 기존 대형 기업과 직접 경쟁할 것으로 예측한다. 인수는 향후 몇 주 동안 심사할 것으로 예상되는 연방거래위원회의 규제 승인을 받아야 한다.

sentences: Riverside Medical Center has broken ground on a $150 million expansion project that will add a new six-story patient care tower to its existing campus on Harbor Drive.
The facility, designed by the internationally acclaimed architectural firm Whitfield & Associates, is scheduled to open to patients in early 2028.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (D) A partnership with an architectural firm
(C) Changes to patient admission policies
(B) A hospital construction project
(A) The hiring of new medical staff
steps.kr: Riverside Medical Center가 Harbor Drive 기존 캠퍼스에 6층 규모의 새 환자 치료 타워를 추가하는 1억 5천만 달러 규모의 확장 프로젝트에 착공했다. 세계적으로 유명한 건축 회사 Whitfield & Associates가 설계한 이 시설은 2028년 초 환자에게 개방될 예정이다.

sentences: The new tower will house 200 private patient rooms, a dedicated pediatric emergency department, and a state-of-the-art surgical center with 12 operating rooms.
Hospital administrators expect the expansion to increase the center's annual patient capacity by approximately 35 percent.
steps.question: How many operating rooms will the new tower have?
steps.question_kr: 새 타워에는 수술실이 몇 개 있을 예정인가?
steps.kr: 새 타워에는 200개의 1인 병실, 전용 소아 응급실, 12개 수술실을 갖춘 최첨단 외과 센터가 입주한다. 병원 행정진은 이 확장으로 센터의 연간 환자 수용 능력이 약 35% 증가할 것으로 예상한다.

sentences: Riverside has also committed to hiring an additional 450 healthcare professionals, including nurses, physicians, and support staff, to accommodate the increased patient volume.
The hospital noted that priority in hiring will be given to graduates of local nursing programs and residents completing their training at the center.
steps.question: What can be inferred about Riverside's hiring plans?
steps.question_kr: Riverside의 채용 계획에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) Only experienced doctors will be recruited
(C) All positions will be filled before the tower opens
(D) Hiring will be outsourced to a recruitment agency
(B) Local candidates will have an advantage
choices_kr: (A) 모든 직위가 타워 개관 전에 채워질 것이다
steps.kr: Riverside는 증가하는 환자 수에 대응하기 위해 간호사, 의사, 지원 인력을 포함한 450명의 추가 의료 전문가를 채용하기로 약속했다. 병원은 지역 간호 프로그램 졸업생과 센터에서 수련을 마친 레지던트에게 채용 우선권을 줄 것이라고 밝혔다.

sentences: The Nakamura Foundation has launched a $10 million scholarship initiative aimed at supporting first-generation college students pursuing degrees in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
The program, named the Future Innovators Scholarship, will provide full tuition coverage and a monthly living stipend to up to 200 students annually.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this announcement?
choices: (A) To recruit professors for a university
(D) To promote a STEM career fair
(C) To announce changes to university admission requirements
(B) To introduce a new scholarship program
choices_kr: (D) 대학 입학 요건 변경을 발표하기 위해
steps.kr: Nakamura 재단은 과학, 기술, 공학, 수학 분야 학위를 취득하는 1세대 대학생을 지원하기 위한 1천만 달러 규모의 장학금 사업을 시작했다. Future Innovators Scholarship이라는 이 프로그램은 매년 최대 200명의 학생에게 전액 등록금과 월간 생활 보조금을 제공한다.

sentences: Eligible applicants must demonstrate financial need, maintain a minimum GPA of 3.2, and be enrolled at one of the 50 partner universities across the country.
Applications for the inaugural class are due by March 15, and recipients will be notified by May 1.
steps.question: What is one requirement for applicants?
choices: (B) A minimum GPA of 3.2
(D) Enrollment in a graduate-level program
(C) A letter of recommendation from a senator
(A) Prior work experience in a STEM field
steps.kr: 자격 있는 지원자는 재정적 필요를 입증하고, 최소 GPA 3.2를 유지하며, 전국 50개 협력 대학 중 하나에 재학 중이어야 한다. 첫 번째 기수의 지원 마감일은 3월 15일이며, 수혜자는 5월 1일까지 통보받는다.

sentences: Foundation director Yuki Nakamura stated that the scholarship was inspired by her own experience as the first person in her family to attend college in the United States.
She emphasized that the program is designed not only to cover academic costs but also to provide mentorship and career networking opportunities for recipients.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the scholarship program?
steps.question_kr: 장학금 프로그램에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (C) It was established by a government agency
(D) It requires students to work part-time
(A) It is limited to students in one state
(B) It offers support beyond financial assistance
steps.kr: 재단 이사 Yuki Nakamura는 이 장학금이 미국에서 가족 최초로 대학에 진학한 자신의 경험에서 영감을 받았다고 밝혔다. 그녀는 이 프로그램이 학업 비용 충당뿐만 아니라 수혜자에게 멘토십과 커리어 네트워킹 기회를 제공하도록 설계되었다고 강조했다.

sentences: The Ministry of Environment has introduced new regulations requiring all manufacturing facilities with more than 100 employees to reduce carbon emissions by 30 percent within the next five years.
Companies that fail to meet the targets will face annual penalties of up to $500,000 and may have their operating licenses suspended.
steps.question: What is the article primarily about?
choices: (C) The closure of polluting factories
(A) Tax incentives for green companies
(B) New carbon emission reduction regulations
(D) An international climate summit
steps.kr: 환경부는 직원 100명 이상의 모든 제조 시설에 향후 5년 내 탄소 배출량을 30% 감축하도록 요구하는 새로운 규정을 도입했다. 목표를 충족하지 못하는 기업은 연간 최대 50만 달러의 벌금을 부과받으며 운영 허가가 정지될 수 있다.

sentences: To assist businesses in the transition, the government will offer low-interest loans of up to $2 million for investments in clean energy equipment and sustainable production processes.
Additionally, companies that achieve their reduction targets ahead of schedule will qualify for a 15 percent corporate tax reduction.
steps.question: What incentive is offered to companies that meet targets early?
steps.question_kr: 목표를 조기 달성한 기업에게 어떤 혜택이 제공되는가?
choices: (B) A 15 percent corporate tax reduction
(D) Extended compliance deadlines
(A) Free renewable energy equipment
(C) Government contracts
steps.kr: 정부는 기업의 전환을 돕기 위해 청정에너지 장비와 지속 가능한 생산 공정 투자를 위한 최대 200만 달러의 저금리 대출을 제공할 것이다. 또한 감축 목표를 조기에 달성한 기업은 법인세 15% 감면 자격을 얻는다.

sentences: Environmental groups have praised the regulations as a significant step forward, though some business associations have expressed concern about the financial burden on smaller manufacturers.
The ministry responded that the loan programs and tax benefits are specifically designed to ease the transition for companies with limited resources.
steps.question: What can be inferred from the article?
choices: (D) The regulations will take effect immediately
(C) Environmental groups oppose the regulations
(B) The government has considered the impact on smaller companies
(A) All businesses support the new regulations
choices_kr: (B) 정부가 소규모 기업에 대한 영향을 고려했다
steps.kr: 환경 단체들은 이 규정을 중요한 진전으로 평가했으나, 일부 사업 단체들은 소규모 제조업체의 재정적 부담에 대한 우려를 표명했다. 환경부는 대출 프로그램과 세금 혜택이 자원이 제한된 기업의 전환을 용이하게 하도록 특별히 설계되었다고 답했다.

sentences: SkyBridge Airlines has announced the launch of five new direct routes connecting major cities in Southeast Asia with destinations in Europe and North America, effective November 1.
The expansion represents the largest single addition to the carrier's network in its 25-year history and includes daily service between Bangkok and London.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this announcement?
choices: (B) To announce new flight routes
(D) To advertise discounted airfares
(A) To report on an airline's financial losses
(C) To introduce a new type of aircraft
steps.kr: SkyBridge Airlines는 11월 1일부터 동남아시아 주요 도시와 유럽 및 북미 목적지를 연결하는 5개 신규 직항 노선 취항을 발표했다. 이 확장은 25년 역사상 가장 큰 단일 네트워크 확충이며, 방콕-런던 간 매일 운항 서비스가 포함된다.

sentences: To support the new routes, SkyBridge has ordered eight Boeing 787 Dreamliner aircraft, which feature fuel-efficient engines and a redesigned cabin layout with wider seats in all classes.
Passengers booking flights on the new routes before September 30 will receive a 20 percent introductory discount on round-trip fares.
steps.question: What discount is available for early bookings?
steps.question_kr: 조기 예약 시 어떤 할인이 제공되는가?
choices: (D) Complimentary seat upgrades
(B) Free checked baggage
(A) 10 percent off one-way fares
(C) 20 percent off round-trip fares
steps.kr: 새 노선을 지원하기 위해 SkyBridge는 연료 효율적 엔진과 전 클래스 넓은 좌석의 재설계된 객실 레이아웃을 갖춘 보잉 787 드림라이너 8대를 주문했다. 9월 30일 이전에 새 노선 항공편을 예약하는 승객은 왕복 운임 20% 소개 할인을 받는다.

sentences: Aviation industry experts suggest that the expansion signals SkyBridge's intention to compete more aggressively with established long-haul carriers in the region.
The airline's CEO noted that growing demand from business travelers between Asia and Europe was a key factor in the decision to add the new routes.
steps.question: What can be inferred about SkyBridge's strategy?
steps.question_kr: SkyBridge의 전략에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It plans to reduce its domestic routes
(B) It is targeting the business travel market
(C) It will merge with a European airline
(D) It expects tourism to decline
steps.kr: 항공 업계 전문가들은 이 확장이 SkyBridge가 지역 내 기존 장거리 항공사와 더 공격적으로 경쟁하려는 의도를 나타낸다고 분석한다. 항공사 CEO는 아시아-유럽 간 비즈니스 여행객의 증가하는 수요가 새 노선 추가 결정의 핵심 요인이었다고 밝혔다.

sentences: Orion Electric has confirmed plans to construct a $780 million semiconductor fabrication plant in the city of Lakewood, creating an estimated 3,000 permanent jobs over the next three years.
Construction is expected to begin in January and the facility should be fully operational by mid-2028.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (C) A semiconductor shortage crisis
(A) A city government budget proposal
(D) Job cuts at a technology company
(B) The construction of a new manufacturing facility
steps.kr: Orion Electric은 Lakewood 시에 7억 8천만 달러 규모의 반도체 제조 공장을 건설해 향후 3년간 약 3,000개의 정규직 일자리를 창출할 계획을 확인했다. 공사는 1월에 시작될 예정이며 시설은 2028년 중반에 완전 가동될 예정이다.

sentences: The Lakewood City Council approved a package of tax incentives worth $45 million to attract the project, including a ten-year property tax exemption and reduced utility rates for the first five years.
Mayor Susan Park described the agreement as transformative for the local economy.
steps.question: What tax benefit was offered to Orion Electric?
steps.question_kr: Orion Electric에 제공된 세금 혜택은 무엇인가?
choices: (A) A five-year income tax holiday
(D) A permanent sales tax reduction
(C) Free land for the factory
(B) A ten-year property tax exemption
steps.kr: Lakewood 시의회는 10년간 재산세 면제와 처음 5년간 공공요금 인하를 포함한 4,500만 달러 상당의 세금 인센티브 패키지를 승인했다. Susan Park 시장은 이 합의가 지역 경제에 변혁적이라고 설명했다.

sentences: Analysts note that Orion's investment comes amid a global push to diversify semiconductor supply chains away from a handful of dominant producers in East Asia.
The company plans to manufacture advanced chips used in electric vehicles, medical devices, and telecommunications equipment at the new facility.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the global semiconductor industry?
steps.question_kr: 글로벌 반도체 산업에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) Production is becoming more geographically diverse
(B) Demand for semiconductors is declining
(C) East Asian producers are expanding capacity
(D) Only military applications use advanced chips
choices_kr: (D) 동아시아 생산자들이 생산 능력을 확대하고 있다
steps.kr: 분석가들은 Orion의 투자가 동아시아의 소수 지배적 생산자로부터 반도체 공급망을 다각화하려는 글로벌 움직임 속에서 이루어졌다고 지적한다. 이 회사는 새 시설에서 전기차, 의료기기, 통신 장비에 사용되는 첨단 칩을 제조할 계획이다.

sentences: The National Central Library has launched a three-year digitization project that will convert over 500,000 rare manuscripts, historical maps, and photographs into high-resolution digital formats.
The initiative, funded by a $12 million government grant, aims to make the library's most valuable collections accessible to researchers and the general public worldwide.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (B) To describe a library digitization project
(D) To report on library budget cuts
(A) To announce the closure of a library
(C) To promote a new book collection
steps.kr: 국립중앙도서관이 50만 점 이상의 희귀 원고, 역사 지도, 사진을 고해상도 디지털 형식으로 변환하는 3년간의 디지털화 프로젝트를 시작했다. 1,200만 달러의 정부 보조금으로 지원되는 이 사업은 도서관의 가장 가치 있는 컬렉션을 전 세계 연구자와 일반 대중이 접근할 수 있도록 하는 것을 목표로 한다.

sentences: The digitized materials will be hosted on a newly developed online platform that allows users to search, browse, and download content free of charge.
Library director Thomas Kang noted that the platform will also feature interactive tools that enable users to zoom into fine details of historical documents.
steps.question: What feature will the online platform offer?
choices: (B) Tools to zoom into details of historical materials
(C) Live video tours of the library
(A) Paid subscription access to rare documents
(D) An online book purchasing system
choices_kr: (B) 역사 자료의 세부 사항을 확대하는 도구
(C) 희귀 문서에 대한 유료 구독 접근
steps.kr: 디지털화된 자료는 사용자가 무료로 검색, 탐색, 다운로드할 수 있는 새로 개발된 온라인 플랫폼에 호스팅된다. 도서관장 Thomas Kang은 이 플랫폼에 역사적 문서의 세밀한 부분을 확대할 수 있는 인터랙티브 도구도 탑재될 것이라고 밝혔다.

sentences: The library expects the digital collection to attract over one million online visitors in its first year, significantly expanding access beyond those who can physically visit the facility.
International institutions, including the British Library and the Library of Congress, have expressed interest in linking their own digital archives with the new platform.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the digitization project?
steps.question_kr: 디지털화 프로젝트에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) It may lead to international collaboration
(C) It will replace physical library visits entirely
(D) It is expected to generate significant revenue
(A) It will only serve domestic researchers
choices_kr: (A) 물리적 도서관 방문을 완전히 대체할 것이다
steps.kr: 도서관은 디지털 컬렉션이 첫 해에 100만 명 이상의 온라인 방문객을 유치하여 실제 방문할 수 있는 사람들을 넘어 접근성을 크게 확대할 것으로 예상한다. 영국 도서관과 미국 의회도서관을 포함한 국제 기관들이 자체 디지털 아카이브를 새 플랫폼과 연계하는 데 관심을 표명했다.

sentences: The Department of Public Health has launched a nationwide vaccination campaign targeting adults over the age of 50 who have not yet received booster shots against influenza and pneumonia.
The campaign, running from October through December, will offer free vaccinations at over 3,000 participating clinics, pharmacies, and community health centers.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (B) A public vaccination campaign
(A) New hospital visiting hours
(C) Research on a new medicine
(D) Changes to health insurance policies
steps.kr: 보건부는 인플루엔자와 폐렴 부스터 접종을 아직 받지 않은 50세 이상 성인을 대상으로 전국적인 예방접종 캠페인을 시작했다. 10월부터 12월까지 진행되는 이 캠페인은 3,000개 이상의 참여 클리닉, 약국, 지역 보건소에서 무료 예방접종을 제공한다.

sentences: Residents can schedule appointments through a dedicated website or by calling a toll-free hotline that operates seven days a week from 8 a.m. to 8 p.m.
Walk-in appointments will also be accepted at most locations, though advance registration is recommended to reduce waiting times.
steps.question: How can residents make appointments?
choices: (A) Only through their family doctor
(C) Through a website or toll-free hotline
(B) By visiting the clinic in person
(D) By sending a written request by mail
steps.kr: 주민들은 전용 웹사이트를 통하거나 매일 오전 8시부터 오후 8시까지 운영되는 무료 전화 핫라인에 전화하여 예약할 수 있다. 대부분의 장소에서 예약 없이 방문도 가능하지만, 대기 시간을 줄이기 위해 사전 등록이 권장된다.

sentences: Health officials warned that vaccination rates among older adults have dropped by 12 percent over the past two years, increasing the risk of severe complications during the winter flu season.
The department hopes the campaign will bring vaccination rates back to pre-pandemic levels by the end of the year.
steps.question: What can be inferred from the article?
choices: (B) The flu season has been unusually mild
(A) Vaccination rates have been decreasing recently
(D) The campaign will continue year-round
(C) Older adults prefer not to visit clinics
steps.kr: 보건 당국은 노인 예방접종률이 지난 2년간 12% 감소하여 겨울 독감 시즌 동안 심각한 합병증 위험이 증가했다고 경고했다. 보건부는 이 캠페인을 통해 연말까지 예방접종률을 팬데믹 이전 수준으로 회복하기를 희망한다.

sentences: The city of Westport has approved a $420 million proposal to build a 35,000-seat multipurpose stadium on the site of the former industrial district along the Mercer River.
Officials say the venue will host professional soccer matches, concerts, and community events and is expected to attract over 1.5 million visitors annually.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this article?
choices: (D) To promote a music festival
(B) To announce the end of a soccer season
(C) To describe a river cleanup project
(A) To report on a stadium construction plan
steps.kr: Westport 시는 Mercer 강변 구 산업 지구 부지에 35,000석 규모의 다목적 경기장을 건설하는 4억 2천만 달러 제안을 승인했다. 관계자들은 이 경기장이 프로 축구 경기, 콘서트, 커뮤니티 행사를 개최하며 연간 150만 명 이상의 방문객을 유치할 것으로 예상한다고 밝혔다.

sentences: The project will be jointly funded by the city government, which will contribute $180 million, and a private investment group led by Meridian Capital Partners.
Construction is set to begin next spring, with a target completion date of December 2028.
steps.question: How much will the city government contribute?
choices: (D) $420 million
(B) $180 million
(A) $35 million
(C) $240 million
steps.kr: 이 프로젝트는 1억 8천만 달러를 출자하는 시 정부와 Meridian Capital Partners가 이끄는 민간 투자 그룹이 공동으로 자금을 조달한다. 건설은 내년 봄에 시작되며 2028년 12월 완공이 목표이다.

sentences: Supporters of the project argue that the stadium will revitalize the area by creating over 5,000 construction jobs and generating significant tax revenue for the city.
Critics, however, have raised concerns about increased traffic congestion and the potential displacement of residents in nearby neighborhoods.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the stadium project?
steps.question_kr: 경기장 프로젝트에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (C) It will be funded entirely by the government
(B) It has both supporters and critics
(A) Everyone in the city supports it
(D) It will only host soccer games
steps.kr: 지지자들은 이 경기장이 5,000개 이상의 건설 일자리를 창출하고 시에 상당한 세수를 가져와 지역을 활성화할 것이라고 주장한다. 그러나 비판자들은 교통 혼잡 증가와 인근 지역 주민들의 잠재적 이주에 대한 우려를 제기했다.

sentences: The Clearwater County Water Authority has begun construction on a $95 million advanced water treatment facility designed to serve the rapidly growing communities in the eastern part of the county.
The plant, located on a 15-acre site near Route 7, will use cutting-edge filtration and ultraviolet purification technology to process up to 30 million gallons of water per day.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (D) A proposal to increase water rates
(B) Construction of a new water treatment plant
(C) Water conservation guidelines for residents
(A) A drought emergency declaration
steps.kr: Clearwater 카운티 수자원공사가 카운티 동부의 빠르게 성장하는 지역 사회에 서비스를 제공하기 위해 설계된 9,500만 달러 규모의 첨단 수처리 시설 건설을 시작했다. Route 7 인근 15에이커 부지에 위치한 이 시설은 최첨단 여과 및 자외선 정화 기술을 사용하여 하루 최대 3,000만 갤런의 물을 처리할 것이다.

sentences: The facility is expected to be completed within 24 months and will employ approximately 85 full-time operators, technicians, and administrative staff upon opening.
During construction, temporary water service disruptions may occur in some areas, and residents will be notified at least 48 hours in advance.
steps.question: How will residents be informed about water disruptions?
choices: (D) Only through social media
(A) Through local newspaper ads
(C) On the day of the disruption
(B) At least 48 hours before the disruption
steps.kr: 이 시설은 24개월 내에 완공될 예정이며 개관 시 약 85명의 정규직 운영자, 기술자, 행정 직원을 고용할 것이다. 건설 기간 동안 일부 지역에서 임시 단수가 발생할 수 있으며, 주민들은 최소 48시간 전에 통보받을 것이다.

sentences: County officials stressed that the new facility is necessary to keep pace with a projected 40 percent increase in the county's population over the next decade.
Without the additional capacity, existing infrastructure would be unable to meet demand, potentially leading to water shortages during peak summer months.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the county?
steps.question_kr: 카운티에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) It currently has too many water treatment plants
(A) Its population is expected to grow significantly
(D) Water rates will decrease after construction
(C) Residents have been asked to relocate
choices_kr: (B) 건설 후 수도 요금이 인하될 것이다
steps.kr: 카운티 관계자들은 향후 10년간 카운티 인구 40% 증가 전망에 맞추기 위해 새 시설이 필요하다고 강조했다. 추가 용량이 없으면 기존 인프라가 수요를 충족할 수 없어 여름 최성수기에 물 부족이 발생할 가능성이 있다.

sentences: The 15th Annual Global Innovation Summit will be held at the Meridian Convention Center in Chicago from November 14 through November 16, bringing together over 5,000 industry leaders, entrepreneurs, and researchers.
This year's theme, 'Building Tomorrow's Economy,' will focus on artificial intelligence, renewable energy, and sustainable urban development.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (C) A government policy announcement
(A) A technology product launch
(D) A university research program
(B) An international innovation conference
steps.kr: 제15회 연례 글로벌 혁신 서밋이 11월 14일부터 16일까지 시카고 Meridian Convention Center에서 개최되어 5,000명 이상의 업계 리더, 기업가, 연구자들이 한자리에 모인다. 올해의 주제인 '내일의 경제 구축'은 인공지능, 재생에너지, 지속 가능한 도시 개발에 초점을 맞출 것이다.

sentences: Keynote speakers include Nobel laureate Dr. Sarah Kim, who will present her research on next-generation battery technology, and former UN Secretary-General James Morrison.
Early registration is available until October 1 at a discounted rate of $450, compared to the standard fee of $650.
steps.question: What is the discounted registration fee?
steps.kr: 기조 연설자로는 차세대 배터리 기술 연구를 발표할 노벨상 수상자 Dr. Sarah Kim과 전 유엔 사무총장 James Morrison이 포함된다. 10월 1일까지 조기 등록 시 표준 요금 650달러 대비 할인가 450달러로 등록할 수 있다.

sentences: Organizers expect record attendance this year, as several major corporations have signed on as sponsors for the first time, including automotive giant NovaDrive and pharmaceutical leader BioGenix.
The summit will also feature a startup competition with a $100,000 prize for the most innovative business proposal.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the summit?
steps.question_kr: 서밋에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) It is attracting increasing corporate interest
(C) It is only for academic researchers
(A) It is losing popularity
(D) It will be held online this year
steps.kr: 주최 측은 자동차 대기업 NovaDrive와 제약 리더 BioGenix를 포함한 여러 대기업이 처음으로 스폰서로 참여하면서 올해 역대 최다 참석을 예상한다. 서밋에서는 가장 혁신적인 사업 제안에 10만 달러의 상금이 주어지는 스타트업 경진대회도 열린다.

sentences: FreshMart, one of the country's fastest-growing grocery chains, has announced plans to open 40 new stores in underserved rural communities over the next two years.
The expansion is part of the company's commitment to improving access to fresh produce and affordable groceries in areas that currently lack full-service supermarkets.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (D) To promote a new product line
(A) To announce store closures
(B) To describe a grocery chain's expansion plans
(C) To report on rising food prices
choices_kr: (A) 식료품 체인의 확장 계획을 설명하기 위해
steps.kr: 전국에서 가장 빠르게 성장하는 식료품 체인 중 하나인 FreshMart가 향후 2년간 소외된 농촌 지역에 40개의 새 매장을 열겠다고 발표했다. 이 확장은 현재 종합 슈퍼마켓이 없는 지역에서 신선 농산물과 저렴한 식료품에 대한 접근성을 개선하겠다는 회사의 약속의 일환이다.

sentences: Each new store will employ between 50 and 80 local workers, with management positions filled through an internal training program that has been praised for promoting from within.
The company also plans to partner with local farms to source at least 30 percent of its produce regionally.
steps.question: How will management positions be filled?
choices: (B) By hiring experienced managers from competitors
(C) Through an internal training program
(D) By transferring managers from existing stores
(A) Through external recruitment agencies
steps.kr: 각 신규 매장은 50~80명의 현지 직원을 고용하며, 관리직은 내부 승진으로 호평받는 사내 교육 프로그램을 통해 충원된다. 회사는 또한 농산물의 최소 30%를 지역에서 조달하기 위해 지역 농장과 파트너십을 맺을 계획이다.

sentences: Industry analysts see the move as a strategic response to growing consumer demand for accessible, affordable food options outside major metropolitan areas.
FreshMart's CEO stated that the company expects the rural stores to become profitable within 18 months of opening, based on market research conducted in similar communities.
steps.question: What can be inferred about FreshMart's strategy?
steps.question_kr: FreshMart의 전략에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (D) It will only sell imported products
(B) It is responding to demand in non-urban areas
(C) It plans to close its city stores
(A) It expects rural stores to be unprofitable
choices_kr: (C) 농촌 매장이 수익을 내지 못할 것으로 예상한다
steps.kr: 업계 분석가들은 이 조치를 대도시권 밖에서 접근 가능하고 저렴한 식품 옵션에 대한 소비자 수요 증가에 대한 전략적 대응으로 본다. FreshMart CEO는 유사 지역에서 실시한 시장 조사를 바탕으로 농촌 매장이 개점 18개월 내에 수익성을 달성할 것으로 예상한다고 밝혔다.

sentences: Greenfield Solar has completed construction of the largest solar energy farm in the region, covering 2,000 acres of formerly unused agricultural land in Henderson County.
The facility, which began generating electricity last week, is capable of producing 350 megawatts of clean energy, enough to power approximately 75,000 homes.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (B) The completion of a solar energy facility
(D) A real estate development project
(C) A decline in agricultural production
(A) A proposal for new farming regulations
steps.kr: Greenfield Solar가 Henderson 카운티의 이전에 사용되지 않던 2,000에이커 농지에 지역 최대 태양광 에너지 농장 건설을 완료했다. 지난주 전기 생산을 시작한 이 시설은 약 75,000가구에 전력을 공급할 수 있는 350메가와트의 청정에너지를 생산할 수 있다.

sentences: Under a 25-year power purchase agreement with the state utility, Greenfield Solar will sell electricity at a fixed rate that is 20 percent below current market prices.
The agreement guarantees stable energy costs for consumers and predictable revenue for the company.
steps.question: What benefit does the agreement provide to consumers?
choices: (A) Free electricity for the first year
(D) Tax refunds on energy bills
(C) Ownership shares in the solar farm
(B) Stable energy costs
steps.kr: 25년간의 전력 구매 계약에 따라 Greenfield Solar는 현재 시장 가격보다 20% 낮은 고정 가격으로 전기를 판매한다. 이 계약은 소비자에게는 안정적인 에너지 비용을, 회사에는 예측 가능한 수익을 보장한다.

sentences: Environmental advocates have praised the project for reducing the region's dependence on fossil fuels, while critics have questioned the impact on local wildlife habitats.
Greenfield has pledged to invest $5 million in habitat restoration projects around the perimeter of the solar farm.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the solar farm project?
steps.question_kr: 태양광 농장 프로젝트에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It has no environmental concerns
(C) It was opposed by the state government
(D) It will be dismantled after 10 years
(B) It includes measures to address ecological impacts
choices_kr: (B) 생태적 영향을 해결하기 위한 조치를 포함한다
steps.kr: 환경 옹호자들은 이 프로젝트가 지역의 화석연료 의존을 줄인다고 칭찬했으나, 비판자들은 지역 야생 동물 서식지에 미치는 영향에 의문을 제기했다. Greenfield는 태양광 농장 주변의 서식지 복원 프로젝트에 500만 달러를 투자하겠다고 약속했다.

sentences: The Pemberton Heritage Foundation has received a $6.5 million federal grant to restore the 200-year-old Stratford Manor, one of the region's most historically significant landmarks.

Restoration work will include structural reinforcement of the building's original stone walls, replacement of the deteriorating roof, and installation of modern climate control systems to preserve the interior collections.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (D) A historical research project
(A) The sale of a historic property
(C) A new museum opening
(B) The restoration of a historic building
steps.kr: Pemberton Heritage 재단이 지역에서 가장 역사적으로 중요한 랜드마크 중 하나인 200년 된 Stratford Manor를 복원하기 위해 650만 달러의 연방 보조금을 받았다. 복원 작업에는 건물 원래 석벽의 구조 보강, 노후 지붕 교체, 실내 소장품 보존을 위한 현대식 기후 제어 시스템 설치가 포함된다.

sentences: The restoration is expected to take approximately 30 months, during which time the manor's gardens and gift shop will remain open to visitors on weekends only.
A temporary exhibition featuring artifacts from the manor's collection will be displayed at the nearby Pemberton Community Museum.
steps.question: What will be available during the restoration?
steps.question_kr: 복원 기간 동안 이용 가능한 것은?
choices: (A) Full tours of the manor's interior
(D) Private events in the ballroom
(B) Weekend access to the gardens and gift shop
(C) Virtual reality tours of the building
steps.kr: 복원에는 약 30개월이 소요될 예정이며, 이 기간 동안 저택의 정원과 기념품점은 주말에만 방문객에게 개방된다. 저택 소장품의 유물을 전시하는 임시 전시가 인근 Pemberton Community Museum에서 열린다.

sentences: Foundation director Claire Bennett expressed hope that the restored manor will attract increased tourism to the region, estimating an additional 50,000 annual visitors once the project is completed.
Local businesses have already begun planning expanded services to accommodate the expected rise in tourism.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the restoration project?
steps.question_kr: 복원 프로젝트에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It will decrease tourism in the area
(B) It is expected to boost the local economy
(C) It will convert the manor into a hotel
(D) Local businesses oppose the project
steps.kr: 재단 이사 Claire Bennett은 복원된 저택이 지역 관광을 증가시켜 프로젝트 완료 후 연간 5만 명의 추가 방문객을 유치할 것으로 예상한다고 희망을 표명했다. 지역 사업체들은 이미 예상되는 관광 증가에 대응하기 위해 서비스 확장을 계획하기 시작했다.

sentences: The Occupational Safety Board has implemented new workplace safety regulations that require all construction companies to provide mandatory fall protection training for employees working at heights above 6 feet.
The regulations, effective January 1, also mandate quarterly safety inspections of all scaffolding equipment and personal protective gear.
steps.question: What are the new regulations about?
choices: (B) Workplace safety requirements for construction companies
(C) Environmental standards for building materials
(D) Licensing requirements for contractors
(A) Minimum wage increases for construction workers
steps.kr: 산업안전위원회는 모든 건설 회사가 6피트 이상의 높이에서 작업하는 직원들에게 의무적인 추락 방지 교육을 제공하도록 요구하는 새로운 작업장 안전 규정을 시행했다. 1월 1일부터 시행되는 이 규정은 또한 모든 비계 장비와 개인 보호 장구의 분기별 안전 점검을 의무화한다.

sentences: Companies found in violation of the new standards will face fines ranging from $10,000 to $100,000 per incident, with repeat offenders subject to temporary license suspension.
The Board will deploy additional inspectors to conduct unannounced site visits throughout the year.
steps.question: What penalty do repeat offenders face?
choices: (C) Temporary license suspension
(D) Employee termination requirements
(B) Permanent business closure
(A) Criminal prosecution
steps.kr: 새 기준을 위반한 기업은 건당 1만 달러에서 10만 달러의 벌금을 부과받으며, 반복 위반자는 임시 면허 정지의 대상이 된다. 위원회는 연중 예고 없는 현장 방문을 실시하기 위해 추가 감독관을 배치할 것이다.

sentences: Construction industry groups have generally supported the new measures, citing a 15 percent increase in workplace accidents over the past three years as justification for stricter oversight.
Worker advocacy organizations, however, have argued that the fines should be even higher to serve as a more effective deterrent.
steps.question: What can be inferred about workplace safety in construction?
steps.question_kr: 건설 현장 안전에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (D) The regulations will be repealed soon
(A) Accident rates have been rising
(C) Workers prefer not to use safety equipment
(B) Companies have been spending too much on safety
choices_kr: (A) 근로자들이 안전 장비 사용을 선호하지 않는다
(D) 기업들이 안전에 너무 많이 지출하고 있다
steps.kr: 건설 업계 단체들은 지난 3년간 작업장 사고 15% 증가를 더 엄격한 감독의 정당성으로 들며 새 조치를 대체로 지지했다. 그러나 근로자 옹호 단체들은 더 효과적인 억제력을 위해 벌금이 더 높아야 한다고 주장했다.

sentences: The Regional Transportation Authority has announced a restructuring of its fare system that will reduce bus and subway fares by 15 percent for daily commuters who purchase monthly passes.
The new pricing structure, which takes effect on March 1, is designed to encourage greater use of public transportation and reduce traffic congestion in the metropolitan area.
steps.question: What change is being made?
choices: (B) Fares are being reduced for monthly pass holders
(C) Service hours are being extended
(D) Free transfers are being eliminated
(A) New bus routes are being added
steps.kr: 광역교통공사가 월정기권을 구매하는 일일 통근자의 버스 및 지하철 요금을 15% 인하하는 요금 체계 개편을 발표했다. 3월 1일부터 시행되는 새 가격 체계는 대중교통 이용을 장려하고 수도권의 교통 혼잡을 줄이기 위해 설계되었다.

sentences: Senior citizens and students will continue to receive existing discounts, and a new low-income fare program will provide 50 percent reduced rates for qualifying households earning below the area median income.
Applications for the low-income program can be submitted online or at any transit service center.
steps.question: Who qualifies for the low-income fare program?
choices: (D) Government employees
(C) Full-time students only
(A) All senior citizens
(B) Households earning below the area median income
steps.kr: 노인과 학생은 기존 할인을 계속 받으며, 새로운 저소득 요금 프로그램은 지역 중위소득 이하 가구에 50% 할인 요금을 제공한다. 저소득 프로그램 신청은 온라인 또는 모든 교통 서비스 센터에서 제출할 수 있다.

sentences: Transportation officials project that the fare reduction will increase ridership by up to 20 percent within the first year, offsetting revenue losses through higher passenger volume.
The authority is also exploring partnerships with ride-sharing companies to provide last-mile connections from transit stations to residential areas.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the fare changes?
steps.question_kr: 요금 변경에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) They are expected to attract more passengers
(D) They are opposed by city officials
(A) They will cause a permanent revenue decline
(C) They will lead to service reductions
choices_kr: (A) 더 많은 승객을 유치할 것으로 예상된다
steps.kr: 교통 관계자들은 요금 인하가 첫 해에 승객 수를 최대 20% 증가시켜 더 높은 승객량을 통해 수익 손실을 상쇄할 것으로 예상한다. 교통공사는 또한 대중교통 역에서 주거 지역까지의 라스트마일 연결을 제공하기 위해 차량 공유 회사와의 파트너십을 모색하고 있다.

sentences: Eastwood Pharmaceuticals has received regulatory approval to begin clinical trials for a new medication designed to treat early-stage Alzheimer's disease.
The drug, known as EWD-4200, targets specific proteins in the brain that are believed to contribute to memory loss and cognitive decline.
steps.question: What is the article mainly about?
choices: (A) A recall of an existing medication
(B) Approval for clinical trials of a new drug
(D) New guidelines for treating mental health
(C) A merger of pharmaceutical companies
steps.kr: Eastwood Pharmaceuticals가 초기 알츠하이머 치료를 위한 신약 임상 시험에 대한 규제 승인을 받았다. EWD-4200으로 알려진 이 약물은 기억 상실과 인지 저하에 기여하는 것으로 여겨지는 뇌의 특정 단백질을 표적으로 한다.

sentences: The Phase II trial will enroll 1,200 participants across 30 medical centers in North America and Europe over a period of 18 months.
Participants must be between 55 and 75 years old and have been diagnosed with mild cognitive impairment within the past two years.
steps.question: How many participants will the trial include?
steps.kr: Phase II 시험은 18개월에 걸쳐 북미와 유럽의 30개 의료 센터에서 1,200명의 참가자를 등록할 것이다. 참가자는 55세에서 75세 사이이며 지난 2년 이내에 경도인지장애 진단을 받은 사람이어야 한다.

sentences: Medical researchers have described EWD-4200 as one of the most promising Alzheimer's treatments in the past decade, though they caution that many drugs fail in late-stage testing.
If successful, the drug could reach the market by 2030, potentially helping millions of patients worldwide.
steps.question: What can be inferred about EWD-4200?
steps.question_kr: EWD-4200에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (C) It has been rejected by regulators
(B) It shows promise but success is not guaranteed
(A) It is already available in pharmacies
(D) It only works for young patients
steps.kr: 의학 연구자들은 EWD-4200을 지난 10년간 가장 유망한 알츠하이머 치료제 중 하나로 꼽았으나, 많은 약물이 후기 단계 테스트에서 실패한다고 경고했다. 성공할 경우 이 약물은 2030년까지 시장에 출시되어 전 세계 수백만 환자를 도울 수 있을 것이다.

sentences: The National Film Commission has selected the coastal city of Portview as the host of the 2027 International Documentary Film Festival, a five-day event expected to attract over 12,000 attendees from more than 40 countries.
The festival will feature screenings of 150 documentary films, panel discussions with award-winning directors, and workshops for aspiring filmmakers.
steps.question: What is the article about?
choices: (B) The selection of a host city for a film festival
(C) A documentary about coastal cities
(A) The opening of a new cinema chain
(D) A decline in film industry revenue
steps.kr: 국가영화위원회가 2027 국제 다큐멘터리 영화제 개최지로 해안 도시 Portview를 선정했다. 40개국 이상에서 12,000명 이상의 참석자가 예상되는 이 5일간의 행사에서는 150편의 다큐멘터리 상영, 수상 감독과의 패널 토론, 신진 영화 제작자를 위한 워크숍이 진행된다.

sentences: Portview Mayor Diana Torres secured the hosting rights after presenting a comprehensive bid that included $8 million in venue upgrades and a commitment to providing free public transportation during the festival.
The festival's main venue will be the recently renovated Portview Grand Theater, which seats 2,500 people.
steps.question: What did the city commit to providing during the festival?
steps.question_kr: 시가 영화제 기간 동안 제공하기로 약속한 것은?
choices: (D) Discounted film tickets
(B) Complimentary meals for attendees
(C) Free public transportation
(A) Free hotel accommodations
steps.kr: Portview 시장 Diana Torres는 800만 달러의 공연장 업그레이드와 영화제 기간 무료 대중교통 제공 약속을 포함한 포괄적인 유치 제안을 제출하여 개최권을 확보했다. 영화제의 주요 공연장은 최근 리모델링된 2,500석 규모의 Portview Grand Theater이다.

sentences: Tourism officials estimate that the festival will generate approximately $25 million in economic activity for local hotels, restaurants, and businesses.
The commission noted that Portview was chosen over four other finalist cities partly because of its growing reputation as a cultural destination.
steps.question: What can be inferred about Portview?
steps.question_kr: Portview에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It is known only for its beaches
(D) It is the largest city in the country
(B) It is developing a reputation for culture
(C) It has hosted the festival before

sentences: The Metropolitan Board of Education has approved a pilot program that will introduce coding and digital literacy courses into the standard curriculum for all middle school students beginning next academic year.

steps.question: What is the article mainly about?

(A) A school budget increase
(C) The closure of underperforming schools

steps.kr: 수도권 교육위원회가 다음 학년도부터 모든 중학생의 표준 교과과정에 코딩 및 디지털 리터러시 과정을 도입하는 시범 프로그램을 승인했다. Digital Futures라 불리는 이 사업은 처음에 학군 내 50개 학교에서 시행된 후 2029년까지 전체 180개 학교로 확대될 예정이다.

sentences: The program will require the hiring of 120 qualified technology instructors and the purchase of 15,000 laptops for student use in participating schools.

steps.question: How will the program be funded?
choices: (C) By redirecting existing teacher salaries
(B) From state grants and private donations
(D) Through a new property tax
(A) Through student tuition fees
steps.kr: 이 프로그램을 위해 120명의 자격을 갖춘 기술 강사를 채용하고 참여 학교 학생용 노트북 15,000대를 구매해야 한다. 2,200만 달러 규모의 이 사업 재원은 주 교육 보조금과 기술 회사의 민간 기부 조합으로 조달된다.

sentences: Parents surveyed about the program expressed overwhelming support, with 82 percent saying they believe digital skills are essential for their children's future employment.

choices_kr: (D) 디지털 접근의 불평등을 해소하는 것을 목표로 한다

sentences: Pacific Shipping Group has completed a $1.2 billion expansion of the Port of Clearwater, doubling its cargo handling capacity and making it the largest commercial port on the western coast.

sentences: The expansion has created 2,400 permanent jobs in port operations, logistics, and maintenance, with an additional 800 positions expected as new shipping lines begin using the facility.
